03What I offer

The tools I bring
to every brief.

01

Data-Driven Performance Optimization

Managed $56K in ad spends with a 20% lift in sales. Reduced campaign costs by 45% through data-driven optimization. I use analytics to uncover insights, refine strategies, and maximize ROI — across every platform.

$1M+ managed
02

Multi-Platform Ads Expertise

Google Ads (Search, Display, Shopping, Performance Max), Amazon Sponsored Ads, and Flipkart Ads — plus quick commerce platforms. Skilled at quickly mastering new ad technologies while managing multiple client accounts.

4+ platforms
03

Strategic Storytelling

I translate campaign data into clear narratives and actionable business recommendations. From building media plans and delivering pitches to winning the Talk Yo Case competition — I make data tell a story that drives decisions.

1st Prize ↗
04About
✦ Baruch College · NYC

Marketing isn't about selling products. It's about understanding people.

That belief has shaped my journey from Mumbai to New York City and continues to fuel my passion for growth, analytics, and storytelling. What started as a fascination with how brands earn attention and loyalty evolved into a career focused on uncovering the insights behind consumer behavior and turning them into measurable business impact.

Over the past few years, I've managed large scale advertising budgets, optimized performance across ecommerce and quick commerce platforms, and helped brands significantly increase revenue through data driven strategy. Whether it's analyzing campaign performance, identifying growth opportunities, or building media plans that connect business goals with customer needs, I thrive where creativity meets analytics.

Today, as a Master's student in Digital Marketing at Baruch College, I'm focused on transforming data into decisions, insights into action, and marketing into a growth engine.

Because the most powerful stories aren't just told. They're proven.

05Leadership & Involvement
Graduate Student Ambassador
Baruch College · Zicklin School of Business
2025 – Present
+

Selected to represent Baruch's graduate marketing program as a student ambassador, supporting recruitment and student engagement initiatives.

  • Represented the graduate student community at orientations, open houses, recruitment events, and "Ask Us Anything" panel discussions.
  • Shared firsthand insights on academic experiences, career development, and student life to help prospective and incoming students make informed decisions.
  • Served as a liaison between program administration and the graduate student community by communicating student feedback and perspectives.
  • Fostered an inclusive and welcoming environment by answering questions, mentoring prospective students, and promoting the value of the Zicklin graduate experience.
Senior Marketing Analyst
Baruch Strategy & Consulting Club
2025 – Present
+

Lead marketing analytics for client-facing consulting projects, transforming research and data into actionable business recommendations.

  • Develop market research frameworks, analyze industry and consumer trends, and synthesize insights to support strategic decision-making.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional consulting teams, including strategy and finance, to deliver data-driven solutions and client-ready presentations.
  • Present marketing insights and recommendations that inform business strategy and enhance project outcomes.
  • Represent the club at campus fairs, orientation events, and student engagement initiatives, promoting the organization's mission and supporting member recruitment.
Member
Ad Club of New York
2025 – Present
+

Actively engage with advertising, marketing, and creative professionals through industry events, panel discussions, and networking opportunities.

  • Expand knowledge of emerging marketing trends, campaign strategies, and industry best practices through professional development initiatives.
  • Bridge academic learning with real-world industry experience by participating in discussions and events led by leading agencies, brands, and marketing professionals.
  • Build meaningful connections within the advertising community while gaining exposure to evolving industry perspectives and career opportunities.
